stemHtml: In a Fly-By-Wire aircraft controlled with a sidestick, how may the Captain/First Officer regain priority of his control stick during flight?

options.a: By pressing the priority switch on their control stick.
options.b: By asking the other pilot to release control.
options.c: By aggressively moving their sidestick in any direction.
options.d: By flicking the priority switch on the overhead panel to their side.
